# PERF-054 positive: strings.Builder{} allocated inside a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-054-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func BuildPath(c *gin.Context) {
	var b = strings.Builder{}
	for _, seg := range []string{"a", "b", "c"} {
		b.WriteString(seg)
		b.WriteString("/")
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"path": b.String()})
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
